# Visual QA Screenshot Pointer

The canonical skill definition lives at:

- `agent/skills/visual-qa-screenshot/SKILL.md`

For repo-specific references and scripts, use:

- `agent/skills/visual-qa-screenshot/references/watercooler-visual-qa.md`
- `agent/skills/visual-qa-screenshot/scripts/capture-page.cjs`

Copilot-specific metadata may stay in this directory when required by the tool, but the shared workflow should remain in `agent/skills/`.
